decision.next_action: B2R-repeat: extend direct crisis/manipulation rows or synthesize a branch-specific recipe that increases Bear/Sideways/Crisis fold depth without losing edge.
decision.primary_blocker: TomacNQVariantMatrixV1 estimates PBO from 8 variants x 5 folds, but required Bear/Sideways/Crisis/Manipulation branch paths still do not all satisfy RC-SPA.
